name: harness
description: Reusable Codex harness for workflow-oriented project task control and adapter-driven execution.

interface.shortDescription: Orient, intake, initialize, and execute adapter-driven project work.
interface.longDescription: Agent Harness provides reusable Codex workflow protocols for fixed-contract and adapter-contract projects: orientation, idea intake, project adapters, configurable artifact paths, goal handoffs, run packets, gates, evidence, and worktree policy guidance.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use harness:orient to inspect this project, resolve its harness contract and adapter paths, then recommend the next confirmed workflow.
